title: Proof | Your Business
description: A business-site starter proof page for case studies, trust, and contact essentials.
heroTitle: Create one page that proves the business is credible
heroText: Use this page as a short trust summary: what the business is good at, the work it is known for, and the clearest ways to continue the conversation.

cards.title: Best-fit client types
cards.text: Explain the client or project types that match your strengths best.

cards.title: What the work often includes
cards.text: Use this to summarise the mix of delivery, advisory, communication, or specialist support the business usually provides.

cards.title: Operational strengths
cards.text: Highlight the execution, systems, or communication qualities that reduce risk for clients.

cards.title: Why people continue
cards.text: Use this area for retention signals, repeat work, or the kind of trust statement that feels real rather than inflated.
